---
title: "G. Governance Canon"
subtitle: "Master Document Spec, metadata blocks, ADRs, contributor workflow, error taxonomy"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: compliance
sub-category: G
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# G. Governance Canon {.unnumbered}

The rules that govern the documents themselves. Every canon artifact
carries required metadata, conforms to the Master Document Specification,
and enters via the contributor workflow (PR → validation → merge). This
sub-category is the meta-layer — the canon of the canon.

## Leaves

- **G.1** Master Document Specification v1.3
- **G.2** `[DOCUMENT-METADATA]` + `[VALIDATION]` block templates
- **G.3** Classification labels (Controlled, CUI; "UNCLASSIFIED" reconciliation)
- **G.4** Canon Change Protocol
- **G.5** ADR-001 — Git Infrastructure (Gitea behind IIS)
- **G.6** ADR-002 — Two-Brain Execution *(to author)*
- **G.7** Canonical Contributor Workflow (MOD_V)
- **G.8** Canonical Error Taxonomy (MOD_W)
- **G.9** Glossary (MOD_Z)
- **G.10** Document Lifecycle Management
